import_tract_classifications.description: Read an ngsTracts tract_classifications.tsv (per ngsTracts/docs/METHODOLOGY.md §5.1) and emit a staging_tract_classifications_v0 layer. Producer-side ngsTracts is unchanged; this action bridges its output into the layer envelope contract.

normalize_tract_classifications.description: Promote a staging_tract_classifications_v0 envelope to a typed tract_classifications_v1 envelope. Reads target.source_layer_id from the workspace layers index, coerces types (int/float/bool, '-' null sentinel), and emits per-class counts in summary. Mirrors relatedness atlas's normalize_relatedness pattern.
